raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr fehinni Leetâ grib
tee Wihti mums paprahtam
buht / pee mums dſihwoht / un
weeni Zaudis buht/ ja wiſs/ kas
wihriftigs irr muhfu Starpâ /
apgraishts tohp / itt ka winni
apgraisiti irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winnô Gannami-Pulki/
un winno Sagahds / un wiſſi
winno Lohpi / neggi tee mums
peederrehſ? laid mehs tikſai teem
paprahtam effam / tad tee pee
mums dſihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee klausija Geimoram
un Sikemam winna Dehlam
wiſſi/ kas zaur winna Pilsfahta
Wahrnim gahje / un tappe ap-
graisiti wiſſi Wihriski/ kas zaur
winna Pilsfahta Wahrnim gahje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un treschâ Deenâ/ kad tee
Gahpes jutte/ tad xehme tee di-
wi Jehkaba Dehli/ Sihmeans
un Lewis/Dinas Brahti/ iſkatrs
fayu Sohbinn/ un nahze droh-
ſchi Pilsjahta/ un nokawe wiſſu
wihrisku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nokawe arridsan Ee-
morn/ un Sikemu winna Deh-
lü/ ar Sohbina Afimini/ un xeh-
me to Dinu no Sikema Nam-
ma/ un iſgahje ahran.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Jehkaba Deh-
li pabr teem Nokanteem / un ap-
upija to Pilsfahtu / tapehz / ka
winno Mahfu bij fagahni-
ſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winno Awis/ un
Wehrſchus un winno Eh-
un to/ kas Pilsjahta/un ka
ka bija/ xehme tee.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſu winna
dohmu/ un wiſſus winno
ninus/ un wiſſas winno
was guhſtija tee / un apl
tohs/un wiſſ/kas Nanninô
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jehkabs fazzi
Sihmeanu un Lewi: Juhe-
mann apbehdiſchi/ finir
mann darriſdami starp tahs
mes Eedſihwotajeem/ star
Kananiteeem/ un Wereſit
un es efim mas Pulka /
prett mann fapulzinafees/
mannis apkaus / un es ta
isdeldelhts/ es un mans Na
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija : B-
winnam muhfai Mahfai
Mankai darriht?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
